reasoning: The primary limiter for you is lactate clearance and poor fatigue resistance. Your recent ride shows that endurance is building, but we need to emphasize strength at higher intensities, as seen in the 9.3% decline on your power curve. This session is structured to prepare your legs for the sustained climbing needed on the Alpine Loop, especially on the Sundance to Cascade Springs segment.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (5 min at 242-256W over, followed by 5 min at 201-218W under). Rest 5 min between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
